stemHtml: According to SERA and ICAO annexes 2 and 6, a Commercial Air Transport aeroplane must be equipped with the navigation lights consisting of…

options.a: A white light with a 140° coverage angle on the left, a green light with a 140° coverage angle on the right, and red light with a 110° coverage angle on the aft.
options.b: A red light with a 110° coverage angle on the left, a green light with a 110° coverage angle on the right, and a white light with a 140° coverage angle on the aft.
options.c: A red light with a 140° coverage angle on the left, a green light with a 140° coverage angle on the right, and a white light with a 110° coverage angle on the aft.
options.d: A white light with a 110° coverage angle on the left, a green light with a 110° coverage angle on the right, and a red light with a 140° coverage angle on the aft.
